tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 20 before 100
    move 10 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 20 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 10 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"
        set uuid d838c2e8-32af-51f1-0b4c-80c86041ac3e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 10
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-business"
        set uuid d81f8184-32af-51f1-e0c5-fe95ae7800c1
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "allowed-outbound-dests"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"

end
show firewall policy"}
